heading: The overview of
Master of Science(MSc)
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build Strong Scientific & Analytical Skills With Industry-Focused MSc Specializations
overViewOfOnline.description: The Master of Science (MSc) at Teksversity helps learners strengthen scientific, analytical, and technology-driven abilities required for today’s competitive workforce. The program enables students to choose high-demand specialization such as MSc in Data Science, ensuring industry relevance and advanced skill development. Through research-driven projects, modelling assignments, and hands-on tools, learners gain strong technical competence. Designed for working professionals, the flexible structure supports career growth across data, analytics, research, and technology-led roles in India and global industries.
keyPoints: Choose MSc in Data Science
Gain hands-on exposure to scientific tools
Work on real analytics and modelling projects
Build strong research and analytical abilities
Ideal for working professionals seeking growth

testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

faq.question: What is an MSc?
faq.answer: An MSc (Master of Science) is a postgraduate program focused on advanced scientific, technical and analytical skills. It prepares students for research, industry careers and specialization in fields such as science, technology, mathematics and applied sciences.

faq.question: Who is eligible to pursue an MSc?
faq.answer: Students with a bachelor's degree in Science (BSc) or related fields such as Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Life Sciences, Computer Science, Biotechnology or Environmental Science can apply. Some universities may require specific subject combinations or entrance exams.

faq.question: What is the duration of an MSc program?
faq.answer: An MSc program generally lasts 2 years, divided into 4 semesters consisting of theory classes, laboratory work, research assignments and project-based learning.

faq.question: What subjects are taught in MSc programs?
faq.answer: Subjects vary by specialization but commonly include advanced mathematics, scientific research methods, computational tools, lab techniques, data analytics, programming and domain-specific modules depending on the chosen branch.

faq.question: What skills will I develop during an MSc?
faq.answer: You will build skills in scientific analysis, research methodology, problem-solving, data interpretation, laboratory techniques, computational tools and industry-relevant technologies that prepare you for academic and industry roles.

faq.question: What specializations are available in MSc?
faq.answer: MSc offers diverse specializations including Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Data Science, Microbiology, Environmental Science, Statistics, Applied Sciences and emerging interdisciplinary fields.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after MSc?
faq.answer: MSc graduates can work as Researchers, Analysts, Scientists, Lab Technicians, Data Analysts, Software Professionals, Quality Control Specialists, Environmental Officers or pursue PhD and academic careers.

faq.question: Is MSc a good career option?
faq.answer: Yes. MSc offers strong career growth across research, healthcare, technology, education, pharmaceuticals, environmental sectors and data-driven industries, making it a solid choice for science-focused students.

faq.question: What is the salary range after completing an MSc?
faq.answer: Fresh MSc graduates typically earn ₹2.5–6 LPA, while experienced professionals—especially in fields like Data Science, Biotechnology or Computer Science—can earn ₹8–18 LPA or more depending on skills and industry demand.

faq.question: Can working professionals pursue an MSc?
faq.answer: Yes. Many universities offer part-time, online and distance MSc programs that allow working professionals to upskill while continuing their job.
